flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Dixie Technical College rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (882 → 1.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Dixie Technical College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (77.8% → 87.8%).
